data.title: DOGE Gains Access To Medicare And Medicaid Systems: Elon Musk Says, 'This Is Where The Big Money Fraud Is Happening'
data.description: Elon Musk-led Department of Government Efficiency has secured access to the Centers for Medicare and Medicaid Services, according a report Wednesday. The extent of the access and the systems involved are yet to be clarified.

data.title: Lucid Deliveries Up 51% In January, Here's How Many Gravity SUVs Sold In First Full Month
data.description: Lucid keeps delivery momentum going in the month of January with sales up over 50%. Here's a look at how the launch of the Gravity SUV helped.

data.title: TRADEPULSE POWER INFLOW ALERT: BROADCOM INC. (AVGO) MOVES UP 4% AFTER ALERT FROM TRADEPULSE
Walmart Stock Hits New All-Time Highs, Company Goes Shopping For ... Malls?
data.description: Walmart owns thousands of stores across the United States. For the first time in company history, Walmart also owns a large shopping mall.
